project: Excel Import & Export Fix (Mobile, Backend, Docs)
goals: Implement Excel import functionality on Mobile and Backend, fix empty date/period rows in exports, support missing dates/aggregates, and add comprehensive guides.

tasks.title: Mobile: Excel Parser & Row Model
acceptanceCriteria: Create ImportRow data class with validation state (Completed)
Parse sheets: All Transactions, Currency Income, and Currency Exchanges using 'excel' package
Implement column mapping, robust cell value parsing (string, double, date, serial numbers), and skip no_transaction rows
Support missing dates/period aggregate detection (Period column or [WEEK]/[MONTH]/etc description prefixes)

tasks.title: Mobile: Duplicate Detection & Drift Insert
acceptanceCriteria: Match incoming rows against existing local Drift DB transactions by date + amount + category
Detect existing records matching by UUID for updates
Write transactions to Drift database with transaction sync_status = 'pending'

tasks.title: Mobile: Import Preview Screen
acceptanceCriteria: Display counts for Ready, Duplicate, Update, and Error rows
Show scrollable list of rows with details and status icon
Allow checking/unchecking rows for import (duplicates unchecked by default)
Show clear error message indicating row number if validation fails, and block import

tasks.title: Mobile: Settings Integration
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Import from Excel' action under Export section in SettingsScreen
Integrate file picker to select .xlsx and navigate to ImportPreviewScreen

tasks.title: Backend: Import DTOs & Service
acceptanceCriteria: Create ImportTransactionDto with class-validator validation annotations
Create ImportService to validate parsed transaction lists and detect duplicates/updates against PostgreSQL DB

tasks.title: Docs: Import Guide & PRD v4
acceptanceCriteria: Create docs/import-guide.md describing file structure, manual template, aggregates, duplicate handling, and troubleshooting
Duplicate docs/prd-project-pet.md to docs/prd-project-pet-v4.md and update details including Section 25 Excel Import

futureWork.web: Next.js Web client Excel parsing using SheetJS/xlsx, Web import preview modal UI, settings integration, and POST /import/transactions endpoint caller.
